untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'key chart level' (user-defined resistance/support), volume confirmation multiplier (1.5x average volume), and 0.5% pullback threshold which cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. Exit logic mixes absolute loss threshold with relative pullback that requires bar-by-bar pullback tracking. 'entry_price' is not an allowed indicator for defining relative losses.
translation_notes: Attempted mapping: 'key chart level' → pivot resistance (r1); 'any volume' → volume > 0; 'volume reaches 1.5x average' untranslatable without vol_ratio_20 applied to entry bar; '0.5% pullback' requires pullback tracking unavailable; 'close below entry' mapped to close < entry_price (not allowed). Signal is context-dependent (early vs late stage) but direction inferred as LONG based on 'breakout' entry pattern. Holding period of 3 days preserved as hold_days_max.
